title: Sterling MLB330N 3 Lever Bathroom Sashlock 3-inch/76mm - Nickel
features: Easy reversible latch without opening lock case
description: From the manufacturer Who We Are Sterling offers a range of physical security hardware with an emphasis on quality and great value. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter, Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer and a trusted brand throughout the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer Sterling MLB330N 3 Lever Bathroom Sashlock 3.0-inch/76mm - Nickel The Sterling 3 lever sashlock offers dependable security at an affordable pricepoint. We have all sizes covered in the range from 2.5” (65mm) to 3” (76mm) & either a high quality brass plated or nickel plated finish are available. Our sashlocks feature an easy reversible latch system to make fitting it a painless task. It is supplied with all the fixing screws & a striker plate.
